nasb.text: who is at the right hand of God, having gone into heaven, after angels and authorities and powers had been subjected to Him.

esv.text: who has gone into heaven and is at the right hand of God, with angels, authorities, and powers having been subjected to him.

cnv.text: 基督已進到天上，在　神右邊，眾天使、有權勢的、有能力的，都服從了他。

ccb.text: 基督已经升到天上，坐在上帝的右边，众天使、掌权的、有能力的都服从了祂。

csbs.text: 耶稣基督已经升天，就在神的右边，天使们、掌权的、有势力的，都服从了他。
